title: Cobwebs.
content:
The spider as an artist
    Has never been employed
    Though his surpassing merit
    Is freely certified

    By every broom and Bridget
    Throughout a Christian land.
    Neglected son of genius,
    I take thee by the hand.
meaning:
Emily Elizabeth Dickinson's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Cobwebs."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
